title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an AI video generation workflow that uses Claude Code to automate the complete pipeline from concept or URL to finished video, including planning, code generation, voice synthesis, visuals, and music. The system leverages Archon as a workflow engine and HyperFrames as the video generation framework to produce polished videos with a single command.
